system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_material_ncc_get","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[tr_material_ncc_Get]
( 
	@year int,
	@ma_nvl nvarchar(200),
	@ma_ncc nvarchar(50)
)
AS
 --   DECLARE @year int
	--DECLARE @ma_nvl nvarchar(200)
	
	--DECLARE @ma_ncc nvarchar(50)
	--set @year = 2018
	--set @ma_ncc = 'AT'
	--set @ma_nvl = 'BBDKH0001,BAXKH0001'

    --select value from STRING_SPLIT(@ma_nvl,',')
	
BEGIN
    SELECT * 
	INTO #nam
	FROM tr_material_ncc 
	WHERE   YEAR(TuNgay) = @year AND 
			Ma_NVL in(select value from STRING_SPLIT(@ma_nvl,',')) AND
			Ma_NCC = @ma_ncc
    
	CREATE TABLE #temp
	(
	    Ma_nvl nvarchar(200),
		Ma_ncc nvarchar(50),
		DonGia int,
		thang1 int,
		thang2 int,
		thang3 int,
		thang4 int,
		thang5 int,
		thang6 int,
		thang7 int,
		thang8 int,
		thang9 int,
		thang10 int,
		thang11 int,
		thang12 int
	)
	INSERT INTO #temp(Ma_nvl,Ma_ncc)
    SELECT DISTINCT Ma_NVL,Ma_NCC FROM #nam
	
	DECLARE @dongia int
	DECLARE @ma_chitiet nvarchar(200)
	DECLARE @tungay_thang date 	
	DECLARE @denngay_thang date 

	DECLARE cursorProduct CURSOR FOR  -- khai báo con trỏ cursorProduct
    SELECT TuNgay , DenNgay ,DonGia,Ma_NVL FROM #nam

	OPEN cursorProduct

	FETCH NEXT FROM cursorProduct     -- Đọc dòng đầu tiên
      INTO @tungay_thang,@denngay_thang, @dongia,@ma_chitiet
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0 
	BEGIN
		DECLARE @temp1 date = Datefromparts(year(@tungay_thang),month(@tungay_thang),1)	
	    DECLARE @temp2 date = Datefromparts(year(@denngay_thang),month(@denngay_thang),1)
		WHILE(@temp1 <= @temp2 and year(@temp1) = @year)
		BEGIN
			-- tháng 1
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 1)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang1 =  @dongia where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet		                   
			END 
			-- tháng 2
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 2)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang2 = @dongia	where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet                   
			END 
			-- tháng 3
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 3)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang3 = @dongia	where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet	                   
			END 
			-- tháng 4
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 4)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang4 = @dongia	where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet                   
			END 
			--tháng 5
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 5)
			BEGIN
			  update #temp set thang5 =  @dongia where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet            
			END 
			-- tháng 6
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 6)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang6 = @dongia	where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet	                   
			END 
			-- tháng 7
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 7)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang7 = @dongia where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet		                   
			END 
			-- tháng 8
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 8)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang8 = @dongia	where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet	                   
			END 
			-- tháng 9
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 9)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang9 = @dongia	where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet	                   
			END 
			-- tháng 10
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 10)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang10 = @dongia where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet		                   
			END 
			-- tháng 11
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 11)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang11 = @dongia where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet		                   
			END 
			-- tháng 12
			IF(MONTH(@temp1) = 12)
			BEGIN	  
			  update #temp set thang12 = @dongia where Ma_nvl = @ma_chitiet		                   
			END

			SET @temp1 = DATEADD(MONTH,1,@temp1)

		END
		FETCH NEXT FROM cursorProduct -- Đọc dòng tiếp
        INTO @tungay_thang,@denngay_thang, @dongia,@ma_chitiet
	END
	CLOSE cursorProduct              -- Đóng Cursor
    DEALLOCATE cursorProduct

	SELECT a.Ma_nvl,a.Ma_ncc,b.mota,b.quycach,b.mausac,b.dvt,c.vendor_name
	,a.thang1,a.thang2,a.thang3,a.thang4,a.thang5,a.thang6,a.thang7,a.thang8,
	a.thang9,a.thang10,a.thang11,a.thang12
	FROM #temp a
	LEFT join tr_material b on a.Ma_nvl = b.mavt Collate SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
	LEFT join tr_nhacc c on a.Ma_ncc = c.vendor_id Collate SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS

	DROP TABLE #nam,#temp
END

--SELECT compatibility_level FROM sys.databases WHERE name = 'DQHF_test'; --110
--ALTER DATABASE [DQHF_test] SET COMPATIBILITY_LEVEL = 130
--EXEC tr_material_ncc_Get 2018,'BBDKH0001,BAXKH0001','AT'","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cursorproduct","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_material_ncc","dbo.tr_nhacc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
